final:
module top_module(
    input  A1  ,
    input  A2  ,
    input  B1  ,
    output X   ,
    
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);assign X = (A1 || (A2 && !A1) || (B1 && !A1 && !A2)) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      X <= 1'b0;
      if (VPB) begin
        X <= 1'b1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
